Test Case Description: Create MAIN_IN with valid mandatory details
Scenario: Happy path - vehicle checked in for service
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor. Vehicle exists in lookup. DIMO receiving location exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Create Gate Pass
2. Select Service / Repair
3. Keep Gate IN mode
4. Search and select vehicle
5. Select at least one job type
6. Select receiving location
7. Enter arrival date and arrival time
8. Submit form
Test Data: Vehicle: WP-CAB-1234 | Job Type: Repair | Receiving Location: Altair Showroom | Arrival: 2026-04-02 09:30
Expected Result: MAIN_IN pass is created successfully, gate pass number is generated, status becomes APPROVED, and it appears in My Gate Passes / Service-Repair.
Comments: MAIN_IN is auto-approved in current system logic.

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_IN vehicle required
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor.
Test Steps:
1. Open Service / Repair Gate IN form
2. Leave vehicle field blank
3. Fill all other mandatory fields
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form is blocked. Inline error for vehicle is shown and submission does not continue.

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_IN job type required
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor.
Test Steps:
1. Open Service / Repair Gate IN form
2. Select vehicle and location
3. Do not select any job type
4. Enter valid arrival date/time
5. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form is blocked with validation message indicating at least one job type is required.

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_IN receiving location required
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor.
Test Steps:
1. Open Gate IN form
2. Select vehicle and job type
3. Leave receiving location blank
4. Enter valid arrival date/time
5. Click Submit

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_IN arrival date cannot be in past
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN

2. Set arrival date to a past date
3. Click Submit

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_IN arrival time cannot be in past for current day
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor.

1. Fill valid MAIN_IN details

Test Data: Arrival Time: 1 hour before current time
Expected Result: Form is blocked with message that arrival time cannot be in the past.

Test Case Description: Validate DL/NIC old format accepted in transport details
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN > Transportation Details
Pre-conditions: User logged in as Initiator or Service Advisor.
Test Steps:
1. Fill valid MAIN_IN details
2. Select transport mode Driver or Carrier
3. Enter old NIC format 123456789V
4. Enter other mandatory transport fields
5. Submit
Expected Result: Form accepts the old NIC format and submission succeeds if all other fields are valid.
Comments: Current validation accepts 9 digits + V/X or 12 digits.

Test Case Description: Validate invalid DL/NIC format rejected
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN > Transportation Details

Test Steps:

3. Enter invalid NIC/DL format
4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form is blocked with invalid NIC format message.

Test Case Description: Validate transport mode Customer requires customer details

Test Case Description: Verify time picker UI does not duplicate AM PM
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Gate IN

Test Steps:

2. Inspect hour column and period column
3. Select a time
Expected Result: AM/PM is shown clearly in one place only and not duplicated beside each selected hour in a confusing way.

Test Case Description: Security confirms MAIN_IN gate in at correct location
Screen: Gate IN / OUT
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN exists in APPROVED state for Security Officer location.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Officer for source location
2. Open Gate IN / OUT queue
3. Find MAIN_IN pass
4. Slide to confirm Gate IN
Test Data: GP from MAIN_IN created by Initiator
Expected Result: Pass status becomes COMPLETED and notification is sent to pass creator.

Test Case Description: MAIN_IN should not appear for wrong security location
Screen: Gate IN / OUT
Pre-conditions: MAIN_IN exists for a different location.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Security Officer from another location
2. Open Gate IN / OUT queue
3. Search for the pass
Expected Result: Pass is not shown to the wrong security user.

Test Case Description: Security queue card shows required MAIN_IN details

Test Steps:

2. Inspect MAIN_IN card

Expected Result: Card shows correct vehicle and gate pass details needed for gate action without broken or empty labels.

Test Case Description: Search linked pass by MAIN_IN gate pass number for next movement

Test Case Description: Search linked pass by visible journey number after sub movement

2. Search using the original journey gate pass number
3. Click Find
Expected Result: System resolves the journey correctly and does not lose the chain because of sub-passes.
Comments: Validates maintained single visible journey number.

Test Case Description: Invalid linked pass number shows helpful error
Screen: Create Gate Pass > Service/Repair > Create Linked Pass

Test Steps:

2. Click Find
Expected Result: System does not continue. It shows a clear error/help text and no stale vehicle data remains.

Test Case Description: After Sales journey timeline shows stages in correct order

Test Case Description: Initiator marks SUB_OUT as departing when source security exists

Test Case Description: Create MAIN_OUT with immediate payment orders

5. Submit

3. Review credit orders panel
4. Select approver
5. Submit
Expected Result: MAIN_OUT is created. Status routes to CASHIER_REVIEW or PENDING_APPROVAL as designed, and approver is required for credit orders.

Test Case Description: Validate MAIN_OUT visible journey number stays same as MAIN_IN

Test Case Description: Cashier reviews MAIN_OUT immediate orders and proceeds
Screen: Cashier Review > Service/Repair
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT exists in CASHIER_REVIEW with immediate orders pending.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Cashier
2. Open Order Review
3. Open MAIN_OUT using Review/View Orders
4. Review order details
5. Click Proceed and confirm
Expected Result: Cashier portion is completed, status updates correctly, and initiator/security notifications are triggered according to remaining approval path.

Test Case Description: Cashier view shows service order details correctly
Screen: Cashier Review > Service/Repair
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT exists in cashier queue.
Test Steps:
1. Open cashier modal/page
2. Inspect orders list, statuses, payment terms
Expected Result: Cashier can clearly view orders, payment terms, and next action. No broken labels or missing order summary.

Test Case Description: MAIN_OUT with no immediate work should not stay with cashier unnecessarily
Screen: Cashier Review / Approver Queue
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT has only credit or no orders requiring approver path.
Test Steps:
1. Create MAIN_OUT with no immediate orders
2. Check cashier queue
3. Check approver queue
Expected Result: Pass does not create unnecessary cashier work; route follows configured business logic.

Test Case Description: Approver approves credit portion of MAIN_OUT
Screen: Pending Requests / Gate Pass Detail
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT has credit orders pending approver review.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Approver
2. Open pending After Sales request
3. Review order/payment details
4. Approve
Expected Result: Credit approval is recorded. If cashier is already done, pass becomes APPROVED; otherwise it remains waiting for cashier.

Test Case Description: Approver rejects MAIN_OUT with reason
Screen: Pending Requests / Gate Pass Detail

Test Steps:
1. Open pending MAIN_OUT
2. Click Reject
3. Enter rejection reason
4. Confirm
Expected Result: Pass becomes REJECTED and creator receives rejection notification with reason.

Test Case Description: Approver queue includes MAIN_OUT credit items still waiting during cashier review
Screen: Pending Requests
Pre-conditions: MAIN_OUT has status CASHIER_REVIEW with credit not yet approved.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Approver
2. Open pending requests
3. Filter After Sales
Test Data: MAIN_OUT in CASHIER_REVIEW with hasCredit=true and creditApproved=false
Expected Result: Pass is visible to approver even while cashier review is running in parallel.

Test Case Description: Security confirms final MAIN_OUT gate out after all clearances

Expected Result: Status changes to GATE_OUT or final release state as designed and downstream users are notified.

Test Case Description: Completed status shown only after final MAIN_OUT release completes
Screen: My Gate Passes / Gate Pass Detail

1. Open journey before MAIN_OUT gate release
2. Note current status
3. Complete final release
4. Refresh list
Test Data: Journey at MAIN_IN / SUB_OUT / SUB_IN / awaiting MAIN_OUT
Expected Result: Journey does not show Completed too early. Completed appears only at the true final stage.

Test Case Description: After Sales list collapses journey into a single row by visible gate pass number
Screen: My Gate Passes / Gate Passes List
Pre-conditions: Journey has multiple underlying movement records.
Test Steps:
1. Open Service/Repair list
2. Search by journey gate pass number
Test Data: Journey with MAIN_IN + SUB_OUT + SUB_IN + MAIN_OUT
Expected Result: List shows one logical journey row instead of confusing duplicate rows for the same visible gate pass number.

Test Case Description: Detail page shows only relevant data and hides empty sections
Screen: Gate Pass Detail / Print View
Pre-conditions: After Sales pass exists with partial data.
Test Steps:
1. Open eye icon detail view
2. Open print view
3. Check Delivery, Transportation, Additional sections
Test Data: Pass with some optional fields blank
Expected Result: Only related fields are shown. Empty sections are hidden. Duplicate or unwanted fields are not displayed.

Test Case Description: Print view contains journey number
Screen: time
Pre-conditions: and approval actor labels clearly
Test Steps: Print output quality
Expected Result: Printable pass exists.
Actual Result:
1. Open print icon view
2. Inspect summary section
Priority: Print view includes gate pass number, departure/arrival details where applicable, and readable approval/cashier labels without truncation.

Test Case Description: Sidebar and notification bell reflect new After Sales actions
Screen: Dashboard / Sidebar / Notification Bell
Pre-conditions: User has unread After Sales notifications.
Test Steps:
1. Trigger flow events such as MAIN_IN create, SUB_OUT arrival, MAIN_OUT approval
2. Check notification bell and relevant menu pages
Expected Result: Unread count updates and notifications show meaningful titles/messages for the actor's pending action.
Comments: Validate notification visibility rather than exact styling only.

Test Case Description: Role-based pages reject unauthorized access
Screen: Direct URL access
Pre-conditions: Test users for Initiator
Test Steps: Security Officer
Expected Result: Approver
Status v1.0:
1. Try to open cashier page as Initiator
2. Try to open approver page as Security
3. Try to open security gate queue as Cashier
Comments: Unauthorized users are redirected or blocked from restricted flow pages.

Test Case Description: Rejected After Sales pass can be resubmitted by creator
Screen: Gate Pass Detail / Rejected queue
Pre-conditions: After Sales pass is in REJECTED status and belongs to current creator.
Test Steps:
1. Login as creator
2. Open rejected pass
3. Enter resubmission note
4. Update allowed fields
5. Resubmit
Expected Result: Pass returns to pending review state and approver receives resubmission notification.
Comments: Current code supports resubmit note and date/time update; broader edit scope can be validated separately if enhanced later.

Test Case Description: Creator cannot resubmit someone else's rejected pass
Screen: Direct URL / Gate Pass Detail
Pre-conditions: Rejected pass exists for another creator.
Test Steps:
1. Login as different initiator
2. Attempt to resubmit another user's rejected pass
Test Data: Rejected pass owned by another user
Expected Result: System blocks action with forbidden/unauthorized behavior.

Test Case Description: Service Advisor can access After Sales creation and pending forms
Screen: Create Gate Pass / Pending Forms
Pre-conditions: Service Advisor user exists.
Test Steps:
1. Login as Service Advisor
2. Open Create Gate Pass
3. Open Pending Forms
Expected Result: Service Advisor can access allowed After Sales creation flow and see assigned draft/pending forms relevant to their role.
Comments: Service Advisor shares initiator-style create flow in current implementation.
